Uze %1$s or moar levels 2 enchant an item, an remain wit at least %2$s levels 2 unlock a path forward
Enchantin leaves remainin "magic" in teh area, clearly u didn't leev anytin behind..!
Pwn a %1$s dat iz On Fier in Teh Nethr 2 gain access 2 teh %2$s form
%s iz teh cornerstone ov Teh Nethr an u wasted noes tiem 2 taek it awl in..!
Consume a %1$s wile wearin a %2$s in Teh End 2 gain access 2 teh %3$s form
Mabe dis iz how %s caem 2 b in teh first plase..!
Evolvin ocean dwellr bold enough 2 change 2 teh vry core
advancements.reclaimed.aspect.phoenix.ro: Reckless flame-chasers hoo thrive on dangr
advancements.reclaimed.aspect.remnant.ro: Past, iz wer it iz stuck, well... sometimes
aspect.reclaimed.dragonkin.colossal.desc: Dey r absolutely massive! Meanin dey r difficult 2 pwn, jump highr, attacks knockback things furthr wile also reachin furthr, but attacks themselves r slowr an dey find it difficult 2 fit in places..!!! lol
aspect.reclaimed.dragonkin.description: Colossal, winged dragon creatures unnaturally bound 2 a humanoid body. Dere existence iz unstable, a miracle in itself!! omg
aspect.reclaimed.dragonkin.draconic_wing: Dey haz a unique set ov wings dat r mush moar durable den normal an provide armor by themselves! Unlike a normal Elytra, dey cn also hold Sneak mid-flight 2 descend slowr an boost forward!
aspect.reclaimed.dragonkin.dragon_head_a: Wearin a Dragon Head provides dem wit additional defences an helth wile increasin dere attack damij evn furthr. Wile dis iz impressive, remindr dat dey barely haz eny armor in dat scenario!
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.cold_feet.des: Wen dey attempt 2 walk on watr or lava wile sneakin, dey freeze watr or create basalt frum lava, creatin a surface 2 b walked on!
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.description: Dancr ov Ice an vry vocal haters ov teh hot!
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.fire_vulnerab: Dey taek significantly moar damij wile On Fier, as dere skin melts away undr teh heat!! omg
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.frost_invigor:
Freezin duz noes damij, but instead benefits them!
While Freezin, dere attack damij an movement speed increase, an if completely frozen, dey also gain regenerashun!! omg
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.ice_ballerina: Nuthin outmatches Colddd wen dey r on Ice. Teh densr teh ice, teh fastr dey move!
aspect.reclaimed.frostling.temperature_s:
Dey alredy possess lowr helth, an difrent climates affect dem heavily.
Hot biomes leev dem sluggish an weakened, wile cold biomes maek dem agile an powerful!
aspect.reclaimed.morphling.adaptable_evo: They're nt teh strongest, nor tallest owt ov awl creatures, but haz unmatched evolushun potential. Wen undr certain circumstances, dey cn change dere "form" 2 sumthin moar suitable, dat iz if dey alredy haz an example 2 base it off..!! kthxbai
Dis iz dere natural state. Dey cn breathe in watr an land wile also swimmin an breakin blocks fastr in water.
Unfortunerly they're nt dat gr8 at movin on land..!
aspect.reclaimed.morphling.description: Vry adaptable 2 eny situashun if lft alone 4 enough tiem. Dey endure gr8 challenges 2 mastr teh elements 4 dere own gain!
aspect.reclaimed.morphling.fire_form.des:
Aftr stealin teh fier ov teh %1$s, dey cn become dis state wen undr gr8 fier pressure. Dey taek reduced fier damij, haz moar armor, move fastr an burn les. If dey wear eny armor piece wit %2$s dey gain full fier damij immunity.
Unfortunerly dis makes watr harmful 2 dem an r slightly tallr..!
aspect.reclaimed.morphling.has_progressi:
Dis Azpect haz forms witch ned 2 b unlocked via gameplay first!
Check owt „%s“ 4 instrucshuns on how 2 unlock eny referenced forms!! kthxbai
aspect.reclaimed.morphling.void_form.des:
Consumin a %1$s wit a %2$s allows dem 2 become dis state wen undr teh pressure ov Teh End. Dey taek reduced fall damij an haz evn moar armor.
Unfortunerly dis also makes watr harmful 2 dem an r slightly tallr den a regular human..!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.reclaimed.pebblemite.bug_structur:
Bein bug-like, dey r vulnerable 2 teh Bane ov Arthropods enchantment. Dey r vry tiny, hard 2 catch, but haz vry low health.
Their limbs r so short dat dey can't reach far or deal mush damij!!! lol
aspect.reclaimed.pebblemite.description: Born frum teh stone, seeks teh stone, dere bug like form makes dem hard 2 catch, but also becomes dere biggest weakness!! lolz
aspect.reclaimed.pebblemite.feels_like_h:
Dey thrive wen in contact wit stone-like blocks but become homesick wen nt touchin them.
While touchin stone-like blocks, dey move fastr, mine mush fastr, an attack somewhat faster.
When nt touchin stone-like blocks, dey move significantly slowr, mine considerably slowr, an attack slightly slowr!
aspect.reclaimed.phoenix.adrenaline_rush: As dey r moar hurt an evn moar so wen at death's door, dey become mush moar agile, toughr an hardr 2 pwn overall. Bettr 2 finish teh job quickly den let dem taek bak control!! kthxbai
aspect.reclaimed.phoenix.description: Drawn 2 teh heat ov risk like moths 2 a torch, dey gamble boldly wile sometimes burnin, sometimes blazin brightr than eny uther!
aspect.reclaimed.phoenix.flaming_feather: Winged wit shimmin feathers akin 2 livin flames. Though they're moar fragile than ordinary ones, dere structure allows dem 2 recovr fastr!
aspect.reclaimed.phoenix.reckless_descen: Dey r immune 2 Fier an Lava an taek noes fall damij if in Lava. Howevr dey land hardr than most, receivin moar damij frum fallin in uther locashuns!
aspect.reclaimed.remnant.description: Rediscovered forgotten parts coalesced in2 one fysical body!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.reclaimed.remnant.gravity_control: Dey cn manipulate teh strength ov gravity around dem, feelin lightr by default, an increasin gravity's pull wen crouched!! lol
aspect.reclaimed.remnant.gravity_restruc: Dere bodies haz adapted 2 ever-shifting gravitational forces, becomin largr, durable, an moar resistant 2 bein pulled down by normal gravity!!! lol
aspect.reclaimed.remnant.spatial_displac: Wen struck, unstable gravity around dem may tear space briefly, randomly displacin dere body elsewhere!
aspect.reclaimed.voidborne.description: Teh Void, heavy, dense, drak an hungry. It cn swallow entities whole within it's emptiness!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.reclaimed.voidborne.gravitational: Wen sneakin, dey cn pull items toward themselves usin dere gravity!
aspect.reclaimed.voidborne.singularity.d: Dere bodies haz 2 mush mass 4 dere smaller-than-usual body, causin dem 2 XP strongr gravity, taek moar damij frum falls, an move moar slowly overall!
aspect.reclaimed.voidborne.spatial_insta: Dere body iz 2 unstable 2 touch. Wen struck by a melee attack, dere iz a slight chance 4 teh attackr 2 b slightly displaced!! omg
config.reclaimed.morphling.morph_cooldow: How long iz teh morf cooldown 4 Morflings in half seconds!
(4 example 10 wil b interpreted as 5 seconds; Values 0 an les r treated as instant)
config.reclaimed.morphling.morph_duratio: How long it takes 2 Morflings 2 morf in2 a difrent form in half seconds!! omg

config.reclaimed.voidborne.storage_cap.d: How meny entities NUthin cn hold at teh saem tiem!! omg
config.reclaimed.voidborne.storage_cap.n: (Value 0 iz treated as disabled, wile negative values r treated as infinite)
